node.text:
🧠 POV: You thought ships disappear in the ocean…

But reality hits different.

They don’t vanish.
They broadcast themselves.

Every. Single. Second.

📡 Location
⚡ Speed
🆔 Identity
🏁 Destination

Not hacking.
Not magic.

Just OSINT.

The same data used by:
• Governments
• Analysts
• Journalists
• Investigators

And yes…
you can access it too (legally).

But here’s the part nobody talks about 👇

Powerful data in the wrong hands = risk

They see ships…
You see patterns

They see maps…
You see intelligence

💻 Data > Assumptions
🔍 OSINT > Guesswork
🛡️ Ethics > Exploitation

Real ones don’t just track—
they understand.

Because cybersecurity isn’t about breaking things…
It’s about seeing what others ignore.

📌 SAVE this if you didn’t know ships are trackable
📤 SHARE with someone who thinks hacking = illegal only
👀 FOLLOW @rootxploit.0x for real OSINT mindset

🧠 The internet doesn’t hide information…
It hides it in plain sight.

#cybersecurity #infosec #ethicalhacking #security #technology
